heading: Delaware
label: 87 Delaware
text: Delaware constitutes one judicial district.Court shall be held at Wilmington.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 148 (, ).Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 7536 Stat. 1108Minor changes in phraseology were made.
